description_long: This is a modern city bus with a streamlined, rectangular body painted in a deep teal color. The sides feature large, rectangular windows arranged in a row, with a stylized leaf and branch graphic near the rear wheels and the slogan 'MOVE SMART' in both English and Arabic. The front of the bus is equipped with a wide windshield, side mirrors, and headlights, while the rear is mostly solid with minimal detailing and a partial view of the leaf graphic. The bus has two visible passenger doors on the right side, one near the front and one in the middle, both flush with the body. The wheels are standard for a city bus, and the overall design suggests a focus on eco-friendly urban transportation.
description: A modern teal city bus with large side windows, eco-themed graphics, and dual passenger doors, designed for urban public transport.
description_view_0: Side view showing the right side of the bus with two large passenger doors, a row of rectangular windows, and eco-themed graphics.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the solid back of the bus with minimal detailing and a partial leaf graphic.
description_view_2: Left side view with a row of windows, eco-themed graphics, and no visible passenger doors.
description_view_3: Front view showing the wide windshield, headlights, and side mirrors, with the bus's teal color and sleek design.
attribute_window_arrangement: A row of large, rectangular windows evenly spaced along both sides, separated by vertical pillars, with consistent size and shape throughout.
